statement = (
    "SELECT name FROM flag_audit "
    "WHERE actor = '" + actor + "' "
    "AND name LIKE '" + prefix + "%' "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC"
)

fixes.replacement:
statement = (
    "SELECT name FROM flag_audit "
    "WHERE actor = ? "
    "AND name LIKE ? "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC"
)

cursor.execute(statement, (actor, prefix + "%"))
